checks.name: return_calculation
checks.details: Return matrix is finite, deduplicated, and free of implausible values.

checks.name: weights_sum_and_bounds
checks.details: All weights sum to 1 within tolerance; strategy weights satisfy 0 <= w <= 0.35.

checks.name: no_lookahead_bias
checks.details: Every series starts only after a full lookback window exists; rebalance inputs end strictly before the rebalance date.

checks.name: transaction_cost_application
checks.details: Costs are deducted only on rebalance effective dates (5 bps per unit turnover).

checks.name: turnover_calculation
checks.details: Turnover is non-negative and finite for all series.

checks.name: var_cvar_convention
checks.details: VaR and CVaR are positive losses and CVaR >= VaR for every series.

checks.name: factor_regressions
checks.details: All factor regressions have R² in [0,1] and at least one year of daily observations.

checks.name: regime_signal_availability
checks.details: Correlation, CPI, and VIX signals are aligned with valid regime labels.

checks.name: cpi_lag
checks.details: CPI YoY signal is lagged 1 month(s); a rebalance never sees a CPI print before its release.

checks.name: benchmark_construction
checks.details: SPY benchmark replicates raw SPY returns; 60/40 weights sum to 1.

checks.name: export_completeness
checks.details: All 15 required frontend data files exported.

warnings.name: gfc_partial_data
warnings.message: The common ETF history begins in 2007 (SHV inception 2007-01, HYG inception 2007-04), so longer lookback windows do not cover the full 2008-2009 GFC window. For consistency, crisis comparisons use the common valid start date required by the selected strategy universe and lookback window; benchmarks are also aligned to that common sample and marked insufficient when they cannot be compared over the same full aligned window. Affected and reported as insufficient_data: Equal Weight (1Y), Global Minimum Variance (1Y), Max Sharpe / Risk-Adjusted Return (1Y), Regime-Aware Allocation (1Y), SPY (1Y), 60/40 (1Y), Equal Weight (3Y), Global Minimum Variance (3Y), Max Sharpe / Risk-Adjusted Return (3Y), Regime-Aware Allocation (3Y), SPY (3Y), 60/40 (3Y).
